description.ko: 보이지 않는 주파수가 빛과 기하학의 활기찬 춤으로 변모하는 소리의 물리적 현상에 대한 깊은 탐구입니다.
description.en: A deep dive into the physical manifestation of sound, where invisible frequencies are transformed into a vibrant dance of light and geometry.

prompt: Hyper-realistic 3D sound visualization, kinetic typography of sound waves, glowing neon particles reacting to bass frequencies, concentric ripple effects in a dark liquid void, spectral frequency mapping, cinematic lighting, intricate geometric patterns, 8k resolution, ethereal synth-wave aesthetic.
